outcome_definition: full_time = (uhrswork >= 35) using usual hours worked per week
sample_selection: year between 2013 and 2016 to cover the post-DACA window of interest
Mexico-born Hispanics (bpl == 200, hispan == 1, hispand between 100 and 199) to isolate ethnic Mexicans
Valid birth and immigration years (1900–1994 for birthyr, 1900–2012 for yrimmig) with positive person weights so that age-at-arrival can be computed
